title: Piel en Armonia | Medical dermatology in Quito
description: Medical dermatology in Quito with precise diagnosis, indicated treatment, and steady follow-up so your skin care stays clear and confident.

slides.title: A precise first reading changes everything.
slides.description: We listen first, examine skin, hair, and nails, then map a medical route you can understand from day one.

slides.title: Technology indicated only when outcomes improve.
slides.description: Laser, peels, and biostimulation are selected by phototype, clinical target, and follow-up safety.

slides.title: Telemedicine to guide fast, then decide well.
slides.description: We resolve first questions remotely and move to in-clinic review in Quito when direct examination is needed.

slides.title: Clinical follow-up turns progress into stability.
slides.description: Every review compares real evolution, adjusts recommendations, and keeps medical decisions traceable over time.

slides.title: A team that explains every decision clearly.
slides.description: You receive modern dermatology criteria, close guidance, and a treatment plan that stays understandable at every stage.

newsStrip.label: Schedule and updates
newsStrip.headline: Online booking is temporarily in maintenance; telemedicine and clinical routes stay active so your care can continue without delay.
newsStrip.detail: While the web schedule returns, you can review active clinical routes, start through telemedicine, or open the consultation path that best organizes your case today.

editorial.title: Clinical clarity for your next decision.
editorial.deck: Each block explains what we see, what we recommend, and what comes next so every decision feels grounded.

cards.title: From first visit to full care plan
cards.copy: When skin changes quickly, we begin with comprehensive diagnosis and stage-based medical goals.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea with steady control
cards.copy: Active inflammation is treated while relapse risk is reduced through timely, response-based clinical adjustments.

cards.title: Laser with traceable medical settings
cards.copy: Energy and frequency are defined by phototype, lesion profile, and tolerance to protect skin through every session.

cards.title: Telemedicine when timing is critical
cards.copy: You receive early guidance and rapid in-clinic escalation whenever direct examination becomes necessary.

cards.title: Pediatric care families can follow
cards.copy: Medical instructions are translated into practical steps for home routines, school days, and caregiver follow-up.

cards.title: Follow-up that proves real progress
cards.copy: Symptoms, images, and tolerance are compared between visits to keep treatment accurate and durable.

corporateMatrix.title: Medical units built for real cases
corporateMatrix.deck: Each card states who the route fits, how care works, and the most useful next step.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis unit
cards.copy: A full first reading to define priorities, risk profile, and control timeline.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea program
cards.copy: Phase-based care to reduce flares, stabilize sensitivity, and lower visible relapse risk.

cards.title: Dermatology laser platform
cards.copy: Laser plans are indicated by phototype and objective, with medical tuning at every session.

cards.title: Early lesion assessment
cards.copy: Changing lesions are reviewed early so decisions remain timely, documented, and clinically grounded.

cards.title: Remote triage and continuity
cards.copy: Remote orientation clarifies when online continuity is enough and when a Quito clinic visit is needed.

cards.title: Medical dermoaesthetic support
cards.copy: Texture and firmness plans follow medical protocol with realistic timelines and supervised control.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: Web scheduling returns soon. Until then, you can begin through services or request first guidance by telemedicine.
